text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Smart Falcon sings her heart out until<n>the very
end, never letting go of the<n>audience's attention.
Light Hello feels<n>optimistic about the feedback.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Afterwards, Agnes Tachyon brings<n>Silence Suzuka
to us.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Apparently, concerts might hold the<n>answer to a
question Suzuka's been<n>grappling with. Whatever
the case,<n>we have new supporters!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If we keep up the performances, I'm<n>sure our
team will grow even bigger.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Meanwhile, Mihono Bourbon seems<n>to have felt
something watching the<n>concert as well.
